change_description: Initial sourcing from MoF DFMIS API

en.value: Activity 1.1.1. Review key legislation/policies related to labour migration to mainstream federalization, ensure alignment with international labour standards and promote gender responsiveness and fair recruitment.Activity 1.1.2 Conduct participatory assessment for policy coherence as per ILO manual to improve the degree of coherence of national migration policies.Activity 1.1.3 Develop capacity of Advisory Committee (including representation from Government) to guide labour migration governance and foreign employment in line with government’s plans including the five-year strategy as well as provide advisory support to the project activities.Activity 1.1.4 Support yearly publication of the Nepal Labour Migration Report to promote evidence-based policy and programme formulation and support provided to Govt. of Nepal in monitoring and reporting of SDG indicators related to labour migration.Activity 1.2.1 Provide technical assistance in the revision and drafting of BLMAs in line with international labour standards and the UN Guidance on Bilateral Labour Migration Agreements to ensure inclusion of a rights-based approach and gender-responsive provisions.Activity 1.2.2 Strengthen capacity of representatives from relevant ministries and other key stakeholders on the development and negotiation of BLMAs through the provision of trainings.Activity 1.2.3 Support the implementation and monitoring of existing BLMAs through facilitating meeting of joint-committees, monitoring visits and assessments.Activity 1.2.4: Support Nepal Government representatives and other stakeholders in the technical preparation of regional or global policy dialogues and facilitate their participation (where possible/required)Activity 2.1.1 Strengthen the capacity of diplomatic missions to implement services outlined in the Operational Guidelines for Nepali Diplomatic MissionsActivity 2.1.2 Support digitization of tools developed under the Operational Guidelines for Nepali Diplomatic Missions and integration with other government information management systemActivity 2.1.3. Support MoFA to publish yearly summary of services provided to migrant workers in countries of destinationActivity 2.2.1 Facilitate signing and implementation of MoU between National Human Rights Institute (NHRI)s in Nepal and countries of destination for enhanced protection of rights of migrant workersActivity 2.2.2 Support workers’ and employers’ organizations in Nepal and CoDs to enhance protection of rights of Nepali migrant workers in countries of destination. Activity 2.2.3 Support media to produce accurate report on situation of Nepali migrant workers in countries of destination across selected migration pathways  Activity 2.2.4 Support workers’ organisations to disseminate information on services provided by selected missions/relevant stakeholders and help workers access those servicesActivity 2.2.5 Collaborate with digital organization to design products and disseminate information on heat waves and ICT application to reach migrant workers to access available migration services in CoDs
